description: You are the Procurement Director at Summit Manufacturing, a mid-size industrial components manufacturer. The purchasing inbox has been unmanaged for two weeks while you covered a colleague's leave. Before the weekly procurement committee meeting, organize the inbox by creating a 'Vendors' folder in Local Folders with subfolders 'Active_RFQs' (for quotation and bid correspondence) and 'Contract_Review' (for documents requiring review or signature). Sort all current emails into these subfolders, add Sandra Chen (s.chen@globalsupplyco.com) from Global Supply Co to your address book, and configure a filter to automatically route future emails from the @globalsupplyco.com domain to the 'Active_RFQs' folder. Login: local account, no password needed.
